title: Better TaCZ Modpack [Unofficial]
body:
# This is a modpack created by an unofficial creator!
[--> go to the official mod <--](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)

Crafted for players eager to experience Tacz mods, this modpack is completely free and fully customizable.
Building upon the "[Timeless and Classics Zero Unofficial Modpack [UPDATE SOON!]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/timeless-and-classics-zero-unofficial-modpack)" foundation, we've expanded the content and made more optimizations.

### The most immersive Minecraft FPS gaming experience
- Sophisticated shooting, maneuvering, and inspecting animations
- Well-designed gun craft system - Modify your guns, survival friendly!
- Refined models and optimization go hand in hand - LOD optimization strategies
- Compatibility - Compatible with most shaders, play with confidence!
- Support for some well-configured mobile devices
- Modpacks are usually made with new mods

![TaCZ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566ba8d2feae63200b607d412850642d65ffb126.webp)

Minimum memory allocation for the game: 1500 MB. Recommended memory allocation: 2000 MB.

The number and content of mods are slightly different between versions 1.21.1 and 1.20.1. Version 1.21.1 focuses more on optimization, while version 1.20.1 prioritizes stability.
